title: Type: Null
description: A Cobblemon Kitchen Sink Pack for everyone and no one
body:
Just like the eponymous creature, a chimera full of a mix of various ideas. 
Nonetheless, they're lovable all the same. 

Contains primarily the Cobblemon mod as its base, but expands outwards from there. It also contains various addon mods to help flesh out Cobblemon with additional content. 

This modpack is best suited for multiplayer play with conflicting playstyles.
Despite the amalgam of mods, a lot of care has been put to keep the pack as stable as possible and prevent the pack from being overrun with too much. 

Contains primarily the Cobblemon mod as its base, but expands outwards from there. It also contains various addon mods to help flesh out Cobblemon with additional content. 

The pack features supplementary content mods like Create, as well as numerous QOL mods like Storage Drawers and Sophisticated Backpacks. 

The overworld has been expanded with various biomes, and rendered semi-peaceful, with mobs and cobblemon only attacking when provoked, allowing for a more peaceful adventuring experience. 

Despite the amalgam of mods, a lot of care has been put to keep the pack as stable as possible and prevent the pack from being overrun with too much. 

For serverside additions: Chunky and Squaremap have been included. These are not needed for the client-side gameplay.

*For players, we recommend at least 4GB of RAM allocated.*
